page_title: Attack on Titan: Junior High - After-School Radio
text:
is a promotional web radio programme hosted in turns by several voice actors from the Attack on Titan: Junior High anime. It is a spin-off of March! The Radio Corps.

The programme, meant to run in accordance with the anime series, started on October 12, 2015 and ended after 11 episodes on March 21, 2016.

Episodes

The episodes were included in a CD "volume" together with some extra content.
